decisions.rationale: Observation base_record_id 'route_able-s79-sbs' already matches the existing registry record for S79-SBS (aliases include 'route_s79-sbs-winter-2012', source '2012_sbs_hylan_winter_newsletter' already listed). Per rule, own base_record_id match means 'new' — observation already canonically resolves.

proposed_relations.description: The winter 2012 Hylan Boulevard newsletter documents the S79 SBS as the streamlined replacement for the existing S79 local service. The newsletter headline (p001_c0003) announces 'S79 SELECT BUS SERVICE IMPROVEMENTS' and describes the S79 SBS rerouting at Staten Island Mall (p003_c0009, p003_c0012) while item 1 (p001_c0005) notes the existing S79 would be streamlined with fewer stops.

evidence_refs.source_quote: 1. Streamlined S79 bus service would operate with fewer stops and a more direct route to save travel time.
Streamlined Bus Service (Rerouting of Staten Island Mall-bound S79)
▲ S79 SBS stays on Staten Island Mall's Ring Road
1. Streamlined S79 bus service would operate with fewer stops and a more direct route to save travel time.
